hero.title: Guqula Ividiyo Enye Ibe
hero.subtitle: Ncamathisa ikhonkco le-YouTube. Layisha ipodcast. Lahla umbhalo oyitranscript.
hero.accent: ailomo ngokukhawuleza idala umxholo ococekileyo kwiqonga ngalinye.
hero.placeholder: Ncamathisa ikhonkco le-YouTube, i-URL yepodcast, okanye nayiphi na ividiyo...
hero.fileDropSubtitle: MP3, WAV, MP4, MOV — ukuya kwi-500MB
hero.textPlaceholder: Ncamathisa itranscript okanye umbhalo wakho — i-AI iwuguqula ibe ngumxholo olungele iqonga...

steps.title: Ncamathisa okanye Layisha
steps.desc: Lahla ikhonkco le-YouTube, layisha ifayile yomsindo, okanye ncathisa umbhalo. Akukho lungiselelo luyimfuneko.

steps.title: I-AI Iyawuguqula
steps.desc: Umxholo wakho uyatshintshwa, uqondwe, kwaye ubhalwe ngokutsha ngokwelizwi leqonga ngalinye.

steps.title: Papasha Kuyo Yonke Indawo
steps.desc: Fumana izithuba zeblogi, imisonto yezentlalo, iincwadana zeendaba, nokunye. Khuphela, khuphela, ugqibile.

items.title: Ayisiyo Transcription nje
items.desc: I-AI yethu ihlalutya umxholo, ikhuphe iimbono, kwaye ivelise umxholo olungiselelwe abaphulaphuli beqonga ngalinye.

items.title: Ucofo Olunye, Qonga Ngalinye
items.desc: Zonke iifomathi ezili-10 ziveliswa ngaxeshanye. Ukusuka kwiiblogi ezinde ukuya kwimisonto yezentlalo — yonke into ilungile kwimizuzwana.

items.title: Thetha noMxholo Wakho
items.desc: Isiphumo ngasinye sine-AI yencoko eyakhelweyo. "Yongeza idatha engaphezulu", "yenze ibe namandla" — utshintsho lusetyenziswa ngoko nangoko.

features.label: Iimpawu
features.title: Yonke into yoku
features.subtitle: Yakhelwe abadali abaguqula isiqwenga ngasinye somxholo sibe yimpembelelo ephezulu.

list.title: Ukuphinda Kubhalwe nge-AI
list.desc: Ayisiyo transcription nje — i-AI yethu iqonda umxholo kwaye ibhale ngokutsha ngokwelizwi leqonga ngalinye.

list.title: Iifomathi Zokuphuma ezili-10
list.desc: Izithuba zeblogi, imisonto ye-Twitter, i-LinkedIn, i-Xiaohongshu, iincwadana zeendaba, i-SRT subtitles, amanqaku e-SEO, nokunye.

list.title: Iilwimi ezingama-63+
list.desc: Transcribe kwaye uvelise ngeelwimi ezingama-63+. Yakhelwe abadali bamazwe ngamazwe.

list.title: Ukuveliswa okuSasazwayo
list.desc: Umxholo uvela umlinganiswa ngomlinganiswa ngexesha lokwenyani. Akukho kulinda kwe-spinners.

list.title: Ukuphuculwa okunxibelelanayo
list.desc: Thetha nesiphumo ngasinye ukusilungisa. "Yenze ibe mfutshane" — yenziwe.

list.title: Iifomathi Zokuthumela ezi-6
list.desc: Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, CSV. Ilungele ukupapashwa ngoko nangoko.

list.title: Yabelana kwaye Nisebenzisane
list.desc: Yenza amakhonkco ukuze oogxa bakho babone kwaye basebenzisane kumxholo wakho.

list.title: Yabucala kwaye Ukhuselekile
list.desc: Iifayile ziyacinywa emva kokusetyenzwa. Umxholo wakho awusetyenziselwa uqeqesho.

list.title: Ukufunyanwa okuKrelekreleyo
list.desc: Ikhonkco le-YouTube? → Blog + Twitter. I-Bilibili? → WeChat + Xiaohongshu. Ngokuzenzekelayo.

formats.outputSubtitle: Yenza yonke into ngaxeshanye — akukho mfuneko yokuqhuba isixhobo izihlandlo ezininzi.
formats.langSubtitle: Transcribe kwaye uvelise umxholo ngeelwimi ezingama-63+. Ilungele abadali bamazwe ngamazwe kunye nabaphulaphuli behlabathi.

testimonials.text: "Ekugqibeleni isixhobo esiyiqondayo indlela yokusebenza yokudala umxholo. Ividiyo enye → onke amaqonga kwimizuzu. Itshintshe ishedyuli yam yomxholo."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "Ukuphuculwa okunxibelelanayo kuyamangalisa. Ndingalungisa isiphumo ngasinye ngokuthetha naso. Kusindisa iiyure zam evekini nganye."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "Bendithandabuza umxholo we-AI, kodwa umgangatho undimangalisile ngokwenene. Ukufomatha okukhethekileyo kweqonga kuchanekile."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "Njengomseki oyedwa, esi sixhobo sindinika isiphumo seqela lomxholo. Izithuba ze-LinkedIn, iiblogi, iitweets — zonke zivela kwividiyo enye."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Amaxabiso
pricing.title: Amaxabiso aLula,
pricing.subtitle: Qala simahla, phucula xa ufuna okungaphezulu. Akukho mirhumo ifihliweyo. Rhoxisa nanini na.

pro.name: Pro
features: I-AI ekumgangatho ophezulu + ithoni eyenziwe ngokwezifiso

cta.title: Ukulungele uku
cta.subtitle: Joyina amawaka abadali abaguqula ividiyo nganye ibe sisicwangciso esipheleleyo somxholo kumaqonga amaninzi. Qala simahla — akukho khadi letyala liyimfuneko.

items.a: Ewe! Isicwangciso sasimahla sikunika iividiyo ezi-3 ngenyanga kunye neefomathi zokuphuma ezi-5. Akukho khadi letyala liyimfuneko.
Iilwimi ezingama-63+ zokutranscribe kunye nokuveliswa komxholo.

items.q: Ngawaphi amaqonga endinokuphinda ndisebenzise umxholo kuwo?
items.a: WeChat, Xiaohongshu, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, iiblogi, i-Medium, i-Substack, iincwadana zeendaba, nokunye.
Uninzi lweevidiyo ziyasetyenzwa ngaphantsi komzuzu om-1. Umxholo uyasasazwa ngexesha lokwenyani.
Ewe! Thetha nesiphumo ngasinye ukulungisa ithoni, ubude, isimbo, okanye ukongeza izinto.
Umsindo: MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC, OGG. Ividiyo: MP4, MOV, MKV, WEBM.
Ewe. Iifayile ziyacinywa emva kokusetyenzwa. Azisetyenziselwa uqeqesho.
Ewe, rhoxisa nanini na. Akukho zivumelwano zexesha elide.

footer.tagline: Ukuphinda kusetyenziswe umxholo nge-AI. Guqula ividiyo enye ibe sisicwangciso sakho sonke somxholo kumaqonga amaninzi.

workbench.refinePlaceholder: Xelela i-AI ukuba ilungise njani lo mxholo...
